app.name: Mandatoto
app.tagline: Community election tipping game, made simple.

main.title: Tipping game
main.introPurpose: Mandatoto is an open-source, community tipping game for the 2026 Hungarian parliamentary election. We don't collect your data and no registration is required – the app runs entirely in your browser using a unique token.
main.introPurposeShort: Open-source community tipping game for the 2026 Hungarian election. No registration required — runs on a unique token. Share your tip or create a group.
main.introHow: Fill in the tip form: select the winning party list, enter party percentages, and choose a PM candidate. You can edit freely until the cutoff. After finalization, you'll be scored based on actual results and appear on the leaderboard. Anonymous by default — add an optional display name to stand out.
main.introHowShort: Pick the winning party, enter percentages, choose a PM candidate, then finalize. You'll be scored after the election and appear on the leaderboard.
main.introRequired: Required: select the winning party list, enter its percentage, and choose a PM candidate. Percentages for other parties are optional but improve your score.
main.subnote: Anonymous by default. Add an optional display name to appear on the leaderboard.
main.subnoteShort: Anonymous by default — add an optional display name to appear on the leaderboard.

flow.sessionDescription: The token is your access key. No email or password registration is required.
flow.sessionTokenHint: Save this token. You can restore and edit your tip later with it.
flow.sessionNotSaved: Not finalized yet — your token and profile link will appear after finalization.
flow.displayNameDescription: Choose how you appear on the leaderboard. Anonymous names are auto-generated by the server.
flow.listStepDescription: Party-list tip is optional in this iteration, but improves competition granularity.
flow.listPercentHint: All percentages are required and must add up to 100%. Editing one field auto-distributes the remainder.
flow.mandatoryHint: To finalize: select a winning party, fill all percentages (must total 100%), and choose a PM candidate.
flow.nationalitiesHint: Combined percentage for all nationalities lists (was 0.44% in 2022).
flow.locationPrivacyNote: Your location is used anonymously for community geographic statistics.
flow.guideTitle: How to fill out the tip form
flow.guideWinnerDesc: Click the ✕ mark to select the party you think will win. This is required to finalize.
flow.guidePercentDesc: All percentages must add up to 100%. When you enter a value, the remaining percentage is automatically distributed across the other fields.
flow.guidePmDesc: Only candidates from parties above 5% can be selected. If a party's percentage drops below 5%, its PM selection is cleared automatically.
flow.guideFinalizeDesc: Once finalized, you appear on the leaderboard and in statistics. You can still modify your tip until the deadline.
flow.guideDraftDesc: Unfinalized tips exist as drafts in your browser and are not shown on the leaderboard. Drafts are automatically saved in your browser.
flow.guideTokenDesc: Your token is the only access key. We don't use passwords or emails — without it, you cannot restore your tip.
flow.saveReminder: You've been editing for a while without saving. Consider saving your draft.
flow.finalizeDisabledHint: Select the winning party list, fill all percentages (must total 100%), and choose a PM candidate to finalize.
flow.finalizeDisabledHintShort: Required: winning party, all % (total 100%), and a PM candidate.
flow.finalizeDescription: Once finalized, your tip will appear on the leaderboard and in the statistics. You can still modify your guesses until the deadline.
flow.finalizeDraftNotice: Your current draft only exists in your browser and is not shown on the leaderboard or in statistics. After finalization, your tip will be sent to the server.
flow.finalizeTokenNotice: Save your token — you'll need it to restore and edit your tip later.
flow.finalizeSuccessMessage: Your tip has been saved. Save your token — you can use it to restore and edit your tip until the deadline.
flow.finalizeErrorRateLimit: Too many attempts. Please wait a minute and try again.
flow.finalizeErrorVerification: Human verification failed. Please try again.
flow.locked: This record is locked and no longer editable.
flow.restoreDescription: Enter your previously saved token to restore your tip.
flow.restoreError: Invalid token or tip not found.
flow.deleteWarning: This will permanently delete your tip from the database. This action is irreversible — your token, tip data, and any leaderboard entry will be removed.
flow.deletePrivacyHint: If you just want to hide your tip from the leaderboard, you can set your visibility to Private instead.
flow.leaveSessionWarning: Leaving will clear your local data from this browser. If you've finalized your tip, it remains on the server and can be restored anytime with your token.
flow.leaveSessionDraftNotice: If you haven't finalized your tip yet, your changes only exist in this browser and will be lost.
flow.leaveSessionTokenNotice: Copy your token before leaving so you can restore your session later.
flow.locationDescription: Voluntary data used to produce anonymous geographic statistics — serving as a public archive of pre-election sentiment.
flow.locationPublicLabel: Show settlement on my public profile
flow.locationPublicLabelAbroad: Show country on my public profile

errors.pmRequired: Prime minister candidate selection is required to finalize.
errors.listInvalid: Winner party list selection is required to finalize.
errors.percentsInvalid: All percentage fields must be filled with valid values to finalize.
errors.percentSum: All percentages must add up to 100%.
errors.cutoffPassed: The editing cutoff time has passed.

stats.title: Statistics
stats.description: Aggregated community tip data compared against the election results.
stats.descriptionPreResult: Aggregated community tip data. Comparison with actual results will appear after the election.
stats.consensusDesc: Comparison of the community's average predictions with the official results.
stats.consensusDescPreResult: Average party and nationalities shares from all finalized tips.
stats.groupStatsDesc: Summary of groups and memberships created by the community.
stats.communityConfidence: {{pct}}% of tippers picked {{party}} as list winner.
stats.pmListAgreeYes: The most-picked PM party matches the most-picked list winner.
stats.pmListAgreeNo: The most-picked PM party differs from the most-picked list winner.
stats.geoDescription: Breakdown of tips by geographic location.
stats.geoNote: Providing a specific settlement was optional — those who didn't select one were defaulted to Hungary.
stats.citiesDescription: Number of tips by settlement across Hungary.
stats.budapestDescription: Number of tips by Budapest district.
stats.europeDescription: Number of tips from European countries.
stats.worldDescription: Number of tips by country from abroad.

info.title: Information
info.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Mandatoto.
info.privacyIntro: Mandatoto is built on respect for your privacy. We collect no unnecessary data and put every decision in your hands.
info.privacyNoRegDesc: We never ask for an email, password, or any personal information. The app uses a unique server-generated token as your sole identifier.
info.privacyNoCookiesDesc: We use no cookies and run no analytics or tracking pixels. IP addresses are one-way hashed solely for rate-limiting and never stored in plain text or linked to your prediction.
info.privacyMinDataDesc: We store your token, optional display name, tip data, and — if you choose — your settlement or country for the geographic statistics map. Location sharing is opt-in and can be toggled off at any time. Private tips' locations are excluded from public aggregates.
info.privacyControlDesc: You decide whether your tip is public or private. Private tips never appear on the leaderboard — they're only visible through your personal share link.
info.privacyOpenSourceDesc: The entire codebase is publicly available and auditable. You don't have to take our word for it — anyone can verify we collect no unnecessary data.
info.schedulePhase1Desc: Fill in your tip, save it, and edit as many times as you want. You can re-finalize freely.
info.schedulePhase2Desc: Cutoff — after this point, no tips can be created or edited. This ensures all predictions are made before real voting results are known, guaranteeing fair play.
info.schedulePhase3Desc: Scores are computed based on official results and the leaderboard goes live. Results are updated in milestones: first update at 80% vote processing, then at 85%, 90%, 95%, 100%. Final scoring is only definitive at 100% processing.
info.scoringIntro: Tips are scored on a 0–100 scale based on five weighted components.
info.scoringListWinnerDesc: 5 points for correctly tipping which party wins the most list votes. Binary: correct or incorrect.
info.scoringPctDesc: 70 points based on how close your tipped percentages are to the actual results across the 5 main parties, measured by mean absolute error (MAE). The nationalities list is scored separately.
info.scoringNationalitiesDesc: 5 points for accuracy on the nationalities list percentage (tight 0.5pp cap).
info.scoringPmDesc: 10 points for correctly tipping the prime minister's party. Binary: correct or incorrect.
info.scoringAttendanceDesc: 10 points for accuracy on voter turnout (20pp cap). Default tip: 70%.
info.scoringWhy: The 70% weight on percentages ensures the leaderboard rewards genuine precision, not just lucky binary picks.
info.faq1a: No. When you open the app, a unique token is generated automatically — that's your identity. We never ask for an email, password, or any personal data.
info.faq2q: What if I lose my token?
info.faq2a: The token is your only access key. If you lose it, your tip cannot be restored. We recommend saving it somewhere safe or downloading your data using the button below the tip form.
info.faq3q: Can I edit my tip after finalizing?
info.faq3a: Yes. You can edit and re-finalize your tip as many times as you want until the cutoff (April 12, 2026 06:00 CEST).
info.faq4a: Your tip is scored on three components: correct party list winner (20 pts), percentage accuracy (60 pts), and correct prime minister (20 pts). See the Scoring section above for details.
info.faq5a: All 6 percentage fields (5 parties + nationalities list) are required and must add up to exactly 100%. When you enter a value, the remaining percentage is automatically distributed across unfilled fields.
info.faq6q: Why is a PM candidate greyed out?
info.faq6a: Hungary has a 5% parliamentary threshold. If you set a party's percentage below 5%, its PM candidate becomes unavailable — reflecting real electoral rules.
info.faq7q: Should my tip be public or private?
info.faq7a: Your choice. Public tips appear on the leaderboard. Private tips stay hidden but can still be shared with a unique link.
info.faq8a: The 5 qualifying party lists for the 2026 election: MKKP, TISZA, Mi Hazánk, DK, and FIDESZ-KDNP.
info.faq9a: Yes. The full codebase is publicly available. Anyone can inspect the source code to verify the app collects no unnecessary data.
info.howToIntro: Follow these steps to submit your tip and compete with others.
info.howToStep1Desc: On your first visit, a unique token is generated automatically — that's your identity. No registration needed. The token is stored in your browser's local storage.
info.howToStep2Desc: Select the winning party list, enter percentages for all 5 parties and the nationalities list (must total 100%), and choose a PM candidate.
info.howToStep3Desc: Your tip is saved as a draft in your browser. You can edit freely until the cutoff.
info.howToStep4Desc: Once finalized, you'll appear on the leaderboard and in statistics. You can still modify and re-finalize until the cutoff.
info.howToStep5Desc: Check the leaderboard, share your tip profile link, and create groups to compete with friends in private competitions.
info.electionIntro: Mandatoto is a tipping game built around the 2026 Hungarian parliamentary election (országgyűlési képviselők választása).
info.electionParties: The app features 5 qualifying national party lists: MKKP, TISZA, Mi Hazánk, DK, and FIDESZ-KDNP.
info.electionThreshold: Hungary has a 5% parliamentary threshold: if you set a party's percentage below 5%, its PM candidate becomes greyed out and unavailable.
info.electionNationalities: The nationalities list field represents the combined percentage of Hungary's 13 registered nationalities lists (0.44% in 2022). This field is also required for finalization.
info.groupsIntro: Groups let you set up friendly competitions with friends, colleagues, or any community you choose.
info.groupsCreateDesc: Any user with an active tip can create a group. The creator becomes the first member automatically. Group names can be custom or auto-generated.
info.groupsInviteDesc: Share the invite link — anyone who opens it can join with one click. New users can create a tip and join automatically. You can also add members manually using their profile share links.
info.groupsLeaderboardDesc: Each group gets its own leaderboard and tips comparison table. Scoring follows the main leaderboard formula, but rankings are calculated within the group.
info.groupsVisibilityDesc: Groups are public by default and can appear on the Best Groups leaderboard. Private groups are hidden from rankings but still accessible via their direct link.
info.groupsBestDesc: The main leaderboard features a Best Groups section: top public groups ranked by average member score. Only groups created before the cutoff with at least 2 scored members qualify.
info.groupsLeaveDesc: Any member can leave a group at any time. If the last member leaves, the group is automatically deleted. You can always rejoin via the invite link if the group still exists.
info.tokenIntro: Mandatoto has no traditional accounts — your unique token is both your identity and your access key.
info.tokenWhatDesc: The token is a randomly generated 32-character string created by the server when you finalize your tip. It serves as both your identity and your password — there is no other way to log in.
info.tokenBackupDesc: Your token is stored in your browser's localStorage. If you clear your browser data, the token is lost. We recommend copying the token or downloading your data as JSON using the button below the tip form.
info.tokenRestoreDesc: On another device or browser, use the Restore session button to paste your previously saved token and continue editing.
info.tokenShareDesc: Your auth token gives full editing access. Your share token produces a read-only profile link you can safely share — others can view your tip but cannot modify it.
info.tokenLeaveSessionDesc: Use the Leave session button to clear your current session from this browser. This does not delete your data on the server — you can restore it anytime using your saved token. Useful when switching between accounts or cleaning up.
info.leaderboardIntro: The leaderboard ranks public, finalized tips by score after the election results are in.
info.leaderboardRankingDesc: Tips are ranked by score in descending order. Ties are broken by earlier finalization time.
info.leaderboardVisibilityDesc: Only public tips appear on the leaderboard. Private tips stay hidden but remain viewable through their share link.
info.leaderboardBestGroupsDesc: The leaderboard page also features a Best Groups section: top public groups ranked by average member score. Only pre-cutoff groups with at least 2 scored members qualify.
info.leaderboardProfileDesc: Clicking any name on the leaderboard opens their tip profile. Your own profile link is available below the tip form — feel free to share it with others.
info.leaderboardPhasesDesc: Before results are in, the leaderboard shows the most recently finalized tips and groups without ranking or scores. After the election, it switches to a ranked leaderboard with scores based on official results. A vote processing bar tracks result updates in real time.
info.openSourceIntro: The entire Mandatoto codebase is publicly available on GitHub. The project is developed in the open — the code is freely auditable and reusable.
info.openSourceArch: The app is built on a modern three-layer architecture. A tipping game naturally involves few writes and many reads — this simple structure ensures fast response times and low operating costs.
info.archFrontendDesc: Runs entirely in the user's browser, no server-side rendering needed. Bilingual (Hungarian + English).
info.archApiDesc: Lightweight API for tip storage, scoring, and leaderboard queries.
info.archDbDesc: Simple, well-defined schema. Election data is sourced from open public records.
info.openSourceContribute: If you find a bug, have an idea, or want to contribute code, open an issue or pull request on the GitHub repository. All contributions are welcome.
info.faq10a: Any user with an active tip can create a group. Members join via an invite link. Each group has its own leaderboard and tips comparison table. See the Groups section above for details.
info.faq11q: Can I be in multiple groups?
info.faq11a: Yes. There's no limit on how many groups you can join. Your same tip appears in each group, but rankings are calculated separately per group.
info.faq12q: What is the Best Groups leaderboard?
info.faq12a: A section on the main leaderboard that shows the top public groups ranked by average member score. Only groups created before the cutoff with at least 2 scored members qualify.
info.faq13q: How do I share my tip?
info.faq13a: After finalizing or saving, your profile link appears below the tip form. Share this link freely — anyone who opens it sees a read-only view of your tip and cannot modify it.
info.faq14q: Can I use the app on multiple devices?
info.faq14a: Yes. Save your token, then use the Restore session button on the other device to paste it. With your token, you can access your tip from any browser.
info.faq15q: What does the statistics page show?
info.faq15a: The statistics page shows aggregated community data: average tipped percentages, party list and PM pick distributions, accuracy rates, and geographic breakdowns. After the election, comparison with actual results will also appear.
info.faq16a: Results are updated using a milestone system: the first update happens at 80% vote processing, then at every 5% increment (85%, 90%, 95%, 100%). Definitive results and final scoring can only be considered at 100% processing.
info.faq17q: What happens when I leave a session?
info.faq17a: Leaving a session clears all local data from your browser (token, draft, groups). Your server-side data remains intact. You can restore your session anytime by pasting your saved token.
info.faq18q: What happens when I leave a group?
info.faq18a: You are removed from the group's member list and leaderboard. If you were the last member, the group is automatically deleted. You can rejoin any existing group anytime via its invite link.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.description: An unexpected error occurred. Try reloading the page.
error.turnstile: Human verification failed. Please try again.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.description: Public tips ranked by score. Results are evaluated after the election.
leaderboard.descriptionPreResult: Tip submission is only possible until April 12, 2026 06:00 AM CEST — after this, all modifications and submissions are disabled to ensure fair play. After the election, results will be updated in milestones: first update at 80% vote processing, then at every 5% increment (85%, 90%, 95%, 100%). Definitive results and final scoring can only be considered at 100% processing.
leaderboard.name: Name
leaderboard.resultsSubtitle: Official election results that scoring is based on.
leaderboard.resultsSubtitlePreResult: Results will appear here after the election. Vote processing updates will follow the milestone system.
leaderboard.bestGroupsSubtitle: Top public groups ranked by average member score.
leaderboard.bestGroupsSubtitlePreResult: The most recently active groups. Rankings will appear after the election once scores are calculated.
leaderboard.individualSubtitlePreResult: The most recently finalized tips. Rankings will appear after the election based on results.
leaderboard.preResultsSummary: Showing latest {{tips}} finalized tips · {{groups}} newest groups
leaderboard.topThreeSubtitle: The most accurate predictions based on election results.

groups.title: Groups
groups.description: Create groups and compete with your friends!
groups.infoWhat: Mandatoto is a community tipping game for the 2026 Hungarian parliamentary election. Predict party percentages, the winning party, and the prime minister — no registration required, just a unique token.
groups.infoHow: Groups let you create a private competition with friends or colleagues. Each group gets its own leaderboard and tips comparison table. Scoring follows the main leaderboard formula, but rankings are within the group. Invite your friends by sharing the invite link!
groups.infoHowShort: Compete with friends — each group has its own leaderboard. Invite them by sharing the invite link!
groups.createRequiresPrediction: You need to finalize a prediction first to manage groups.
groups.myGroupsEmpty: You haven't created any groups yet.
groups.viewPlaceholder: Paste a group link or token...

detail.addPlaceholder: Paste a profile link or share token...
detail.emptyGroup: The group is empty. Add members using their profile share links!
detail.topThreeSubtitle: The most accurate tips in this group based on official results.
detail.confirmRemove: Are you sure you want to remove {{name}} from the group?
detail.leaveGroupWarning: Are you sure you want to leave {{name}}? You can rejoin anytime via the invite link.
detail.leaveGroupLastMember: You are the last member — leaving will permanently delete this group.

invite.title: Group Invitation
invite.whatIs: Mandatoto is a community tipping game for the 2026 Hungarian parliamentary election. Predict party percentages, the winning party, and the prime minister — no registration required.
invite.alreadyMember: You are already a member of this group.

ballot.pendingBanner: You've been invited to join {{groupName}}. Once you finalize your tip, you'll automatically become a member and can compete with the group separately.
ballot.leaveBody: Are you sure you want to leave? You'll submit your tip individually without the group. You can be re-added later and leave at any time.
ballot.pendingGroupNote: You'll automatically join this group after finalizing.

errors.alreadyMember: This user is already a member of the group.
errors.cutoffPassed: The cutoff has passed, members cannot be modified.
errors.notAMember: Only group members can manage the group.
errors.needsPrediction: An active prediction is required to manage groups.
